description: Find ComputeConfigDescriptor API

Refinement 1 changes: (1) Add bf16+bf8b to SUPPORTED[dtype], (2) Set intermediate CBs (cb_max, cb_exp, cb_recip_sum) to Float32 format+page_size instead of output dtype, (3) Add bf8b+non_tile_aligned EXCLUSIONS (pre-emptive for Refinement 3), (4) No compute kernel changes needed (helpers handle format reconfig), (5) No UnpackToDestFp32 tagging (all intermediates feed FPU ops)

details: bf16 PCC>=0.99999, bf8b PCC>=0.9998 on shapes (1,1,32,32)+(1,1,64,128), dim=-1 and dim=-2. Zero kernel changes.
Pre-existing Phase 0 failure. PCC=0.999131 vs 0.999 threshold on float32 small-magnitude input. Confirmed via git stash — fails without my changes too. Not caused by Refinement 1.
20/40 passed (all non-OOM shapes). 20 failures are all pre-existing OOM on wide shapes (2048x256, 512x512, 32x4096, 32x8192, 128x4096, 64x4096) — same as fp32. All Done-when cells pass.
192/192 passed (8 shapes x 3 dtypes x 4 fidelities x 2 distributions = 192). LoFi failures resolved by using 0.99 PCC threshold per skill §11.

description: Find tilize helpers and toy example
Find compute_kernel_hw_startup header

Refinement 2: Add ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT support via tilize-wrapped reader + untilize-wrapped writer. Math stays on tiles. Add cb_tiled_input (CB 3) for tilize output, cb_rm_out (CB 17) for untilize output. Use CT-arg dispatch (is_rm) in shared kernels. Multi-core already works from Phase 0 — just need the layout path to use the same split_work_to_cores pattern. Key: cb_output_tiles must hold full slab in RM path (sequential mul→untilize cant pipeline). cb_rm_in and cb_rm_out are double-buffered (2*Wt) since reader↔tilize and untilize↔writer are on different RISCs and CAN pipeline.

RM path plan: (1) Add ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT to SUPPORTED. (2) New CBs: cb_rm_in (CB3, reader→tilize), cb_rm_out (CB17, untilize→writer). (3) In RM path, cb_output_tiles sized as full slab (Ht*Wt) not 2 tiles — sequential mul→untilize cant pipeline. (4) Reader uses read_sticks_for_tilize, writer uses write_sticks_after_untilize. (5) Compute: tilize at slab start, softmax math unchanged, untilize at slab end. (6) compute_kernel_hw_startup with CT-arg dispatch: 2-arg (cb_rm_in,cb_input_tiles) for RM, 3-arg (cb_input,cb_scaler,cb_max) for TILE. Helpers reconfigure between phases.

notes: TILE path regression test passed after adding is_rm CT-arg dispatch
All existing acceptance tests pass — no regression from RM changes
First RM path test passes — tilize-wrapped softmax works

description: Hang: LLK_ASSERT unp_A_src_format mismatch in untilize. The NoReconfigure flag skips hw_configure, but the softmax math (reduce→sub→exp→sum→recip→mul) changes the unpacker/packer data formats. Fix: use default UnpackAndPackReconfigure for both tilize and untilize so the init does hw_configure to set the correct formats.

notes: Pass after switching from NoReconfigure to UnpackAndPackReconfigure for tilize/untilize

description: Refinement 3 complete: Non-tile-aligned H/W reduction-axis masking via partial scalers. All changes committed. SUPPORTED updated, 74/74 refinement tests pass, 228/228 golden tests pass (non-aligned), zero non-aligned failures.
Explore golden test setup + read kernel files
Check ttnn 4D reshape utilities

Rank expansion is a host-side only change. unsqueeze_to_4D on input, build descriptor with 4D tensor, reshape output back. No kernel changes needed. dim canonicalization already works: -1/-2 refer to last two dims regardless of rank. After unsqueeze, the 4D shape has leading 1s so H/W stay the same.

error: OOM: CB grow to 12953376 B beyond max L1 1499136 B. Shape (1024,1024) → Ht=32,Wt=32,tiles_per_slab=1024. Pre-existing L1 budget issue (Refinement 5 scope), not rank-specific.

result: 435 passed, 140 failed (all OOM on wide shapes — Refinement 5 scope), 142 skipped, 533 xfailed. No XPASS-strict failures. 228→435 passing (+207 new). Zero non-OOM rank-2/3 failures.

note: No race conditions — dev and non-dev modes both pass

description: Find OOM shapes in golden suite
Find SFPU binary max op
Read tilize and convenience helpers

L1 budget fit plan: online softmax with 2-pass DRAM reads. Pass 1: chunk BLOCK_SIZE tiles from reader, compute max per tile via BinaryMax SFPU on DEDEST, accumulate exp_sum. Pass 2: re-read same tiles from DRAM, compute exp(x-old_max)*correction/sum, write output. All CBs bounded by BLOCK_SIZE, not Wt. Use BinaryMax SFPU (available in eltwise_binary_sfpu.hpp) for per-tile max without accumulate_reduce<MAX,REDUCE_ROW>. Host dispatches V1 (full slab) when footprint <= 256KB, V2 (streaming) otherwise.

notes: V2 streaming path works on first wide shape
dim=-1 all pass. dim=-2 V2 shapes fail with PCC~0.01-0.03. Small shapes (V1) pass for both dims. Issue is in V2 compute dim=-2 path.
All pass after fixing dim=-2 tile ordering in writer. PCC>=0.999 on all shapes including 8192-wide and 4096-tall.
